source_query: Build a Geant4 proton depth-dose benchmark for a 150 MeV pencil beam through water, aluminum, and silicon layers. Produce range and Bragg peak scoring, per-layer energy deposition, step limiter settings, physics list rationale, CSV output, and validation gates for material thickness and scoring bin size.

value: Standard Geant4 world volume
geometry_decomposition:expanded mother volume to contain daughter placements on z
Water phantom for proton therapy benchmark
Material thickness needs confirmation for 150 MeV proton range
Aluminum layer for material variation study
Material thickness needs confirmation
Silicon layer for detector material study
Material thickness needs confirmation

agent_context.codegen_instruction: Use these user-confirmed values as hard constraints. Edited constraints override the same field_path in g4_model_ir, defaults, examples, RAG, and model guesses. Do not replace geometry, placement, source, material, or scoring values with generic defaults.
